posts.author: ron.victor (Ronald G. Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I love the ability to bring out different entities into their own board and link them accordingly to not have repeat entries all over the place vs coordinated pairings. E.g. As a travel agency, having travel packages defined in its own board, containing information like: Package Name, Check in Date, Check Out Date, Activities Included, Price.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be great to be able to use mirror columns containing data already collected in such a table when a client is completing a work form to sign up for a package.

Right now, I have to list all the packages independently on the form, then do a match to that package to then display the mirrored columns.
